paragraphs.text: 奶奶生病住院了，我和妈妈去医院看她。奶奶躺在病床上，脸色不太好。
paragraphs.translation: Grandma is sick in the hospital. Mom and I went to visit her. Grandma was lying in the hospital bed, looking a bit pale.

paragraphs.text: 我给奶奶带了一束鲜花和一篮水果。奶奶看到我来很開心，拉着我的手说个不停。
paragraphs.translation: I brought Grandma a bouquet of flowers and a basket of fruit. Grandma was very happy to see me, holding my hand and talking nonstop.

paragraphs.text: 医生说我奶奶很快就可以出院了。希望奶奶早日康复，回家和我们一起吃晚饭。
paragraphs.translation: The doctor said Grandma can leave the hospital soon. I hope she recovers quickly and comes home to have dinner with us.
